phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.cultural_note: The Palais des Papes is the largest Gothic palace in the world. Tickets can be bought at the entrance or online.

responses.phonetic: zhoost ahn fahs, soo layz ar-KAD
responses.french: Juste en face, sous les arcades.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about visiting the private rooms
phrases.cultural_note: The private papal rooms (Chambres Sacrées) require a separate ticket. They contain rare 14th-century frescoes by Simone Martini.

responses.english: Yes, with an extra ticket. Ask at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: wee, ah-VEK uhn bee-YAY soo-play-mahn-TAIR. duh-mahn-DAY ah lah bee-yet-REE
responses.french: Oui, avec un billet supplémentaire. Demandez à la billetterie.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if an audio guide is available
phrases.cultural_note: The palace offers audio guides in multiple languages, including English, to help navigate the vast rooms and halls.

responses.english: Yes, in several languages. It's included in the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, ahn plu-ZYUHR lahng. say ahn-KLOO dahn luh bee-YAY
responses.french: Oui, en plusieurs langues. C'est inclus dans le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from the tower
phrases.text_local: La tour offre-t-elle une vue sur le Rhône ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah TOOR oh-fruh-tel oon VOO soor leh ROHN
phrases.cultural_note: Yes, you can climb to the tower for panoramic views of Avignon, the Rhône, and the surrounding countryside.

responses.english: Yes, especially on clear days. Go up the staircase on the right.
responses.phonetic: wee, sur-TOO par tahn KLEHR. mon-TAY par les-kah-LYAY ah DRWAHT
responses.french: Oui, surtout par temps clair. Montez par l'escalier à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the last entry time
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est la dernière entrée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel uhr eh lah dair-NYAIR ahn-TRAY
phrases.cultural_note: Last entry is typically one hour before closing. Check the posted schedule as hours vary by season.

responses.english: Last entry is one hour before closing. Check the posted schedule.
responses.phonetic: lah dair-NYAIR ahn-TRAY eh oon uhr ah-VAHN lah fair-muh-TOOR
responses.french: La dernière entrée est une heure avant la fermeture. Vérifiez l'horaire affiché.
